Everything You Need

Six powerful capabilities. One seamless workspace.

🧠

Omniscient Brain

Kimi K2 — the most powerful reasoning model. Complex math, code, research, writing. All in one place.

👁

Vision Scanner

Upload any image, screenshot, or document. Extract text (OCR), analyze layouts, understand visuals.

🎨

Creative Canvas

Type a description, get stunning AI-generated images powered by DALL-E 3 in seconds.

🔑

Developer API

Build your own products with our branded API. Full access to all models under your keys.

🪙

Coin-Based Pricing

No surprise subscriptions. Buy coins, spend them only when you need. Full transparency.

🛡️

Privacy First

Your data stays yours. Built for MENA users with regional compliance in mind.

⚡

Built for Developers

Generate API keys, integrate OptiLogix into your own products under your brand. Full documentation and SDKs included.

Example Request
curl https://api.optilogix.ai/v1/chat \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer ol-xxx" \
  -d '{"message": "Hello!"}'
Get API Access
